transcript: so go ahead whenever you're ready just tell me about the move the move it's uh probably the most personal song I've done so far cuz uh like I said before I haven't really touched on anything personally besides uh the basic stuff like love loss and heartbreak I kind of wanted to like chronologically do this song uh so that it repres presented where I came from um even before I was doing music and it's impossible to sum up but I was just trying to give everybody some sort of idea of who Jus pursui is at salamander Valley this is definitely a little bit more introspective um and reflective it's not just about like uh seeing about things that are prevalent in pop culture but stuff that I've feel hits really close to home and is um important in my life and constructing who I am and what I've become um all the things that have got me here to this point basically I think that about wraps that package um anything else you want to say party all the time my girls to I should cover that song people will be like Justin this is a hit you just coming up with this [Music]
